Prediction: No

The current visit record does not provide any explicit evidence of a lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid metabolism disorder. The diagnoses listed are primarily related to traumatic injuries and their complications, as well as alcohol dependence and cardiac issues. There is no mention of lipid levels, lipid disorders, or ongoing management of such conditions. The medications prescribed and procedures performed also do not indicate any treatment or evaluation related to lipid metabolism. Therefore, based on the information provided, it is reasonable to predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will not be diagnosed in the patient's next hospital visit.
